meta_desc: Inflatable tent X for events. Robust structure, set up in 10 minutes, fully customisable. Ideal for trade fairs, festivals and promotions.
intro_title_colored: The Perfect Ally for Your Events
intro_desc: Are you looking for an innovative and practical solution for your events? Opt for the Hallucine X inflatable tent, the ideal solution to guarantee visibility and comfort while remaining easy to set up and transport.
design_desc: The Hallucine X inflatable tent is designed to be quick to set up and take down, while offering a robust structure. It is made up of four independent tubes in TPU, a tough, waterproof material that guarantees optimum durability.
design_tpu_desc: Made from polyurethane (TPU), these bladders are 100% airtight, ensuring consistent performance.
design_dacron_desc: Each flange is inserted into tubes made of Dacron, a highly resistant material used for boat sails, ensuring exceptional strength and resistance to tearing.
design_polyester_desc: It can be customised to suit your needs and is easy to dismantle, so you can quickly change the look of your tent.
reliable_desc: The X inflatable tent has an inflation valve and overpressure system on each tube to ensure maximum safety and rapid inflation.
reliable_maintenance_desc: Thanks to zips on the Dacron tubes, you can easily access the bladders for any repair or replacement operation.
reliable_custom_desc: The outer skin is independent of the inflatable, so you can easily change the look of the tent at any time.
accessories_desc: To guarantee the stability of your structure, several ballasting systems are available, including sand ballast bags which are attached to the underside of the poles using strong straps. This system keeps your tent in place, even in strong winds.
accessories_bags_desc: Designed to be filled with sand, they ensure optimum stability.
accessories_alu_desc: The new joint system at the top allows the four flanges to be dismantled independently and held together securely by aluminium profiles.
custom_desc: The Hallucine X inflatable tent stands out for its complete customisability. Whether you want to display your logo or a striking visual, this tent offers you a host of possibilities.
custom_roof_desc: Screen or digital printing lets you create unique visuals.
custom_curtain_desc: Print your graphics in full colour on Ripstop curtains for maximum visibility.
spec1: Protected by a layer of Dacron for extra strength.
spec2: With a non-slip surface for greater stability.
spec3: On each flange to prevent overpressure.
spec4: Double-stitched with zigzag stitch to ensure a strong fit.
quality_subtitle: The foundations of our inflatable structures
quality_desc: At Hallucine, we are committed to providing inflatables that embody the values of reliability, expertise and quality. Designed to meet the highest expectations, our products give you peace of mind every time you use them.
quality_reliability_desc: Reliability is at the heart of our approach. Our structures are made from high-quality materials, such as Dacron 420 for the frames and weather-resistant Dacron 220 fabric for the awnings, guaranteeing prolonged use in a variety of weather conditions.
quality_expertise_desc: With many years' experience, our team has recognised expertise in the field of inflatables. We understand the challenges our customers can face, which is why we offer tailored, innovative solutions.
quality_quality_desc: Quality is non-negotiable for us. Our products undergo rigorous checks to ensure they meet the highest standards. From the ultra-strong awning fabric to the integrated LED lights, every detail is designed to provide the best possible user experience.
summary_desc: The Hallucine X inflatable tent is the perfect solution for your outdoor events. It combines practicality, sturdiness and customisation to offer your customers a unique experience. Lightweight, strong and quick to set up, it becomes a real communication tool for your events.
cta_desc: Contact us for a personalised quote. Our team will be happy to answer any questions you may have.
